name: Beef Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Tortillas should be 10-inches in diameter and warmed.
2. Heat beef and refried beans separately.
3. Place about 1/4 cup of the beef on the center of each tortilla.
4. Spoon about 2 tablespoons of the beans onto the beef.
5. Top with 1/4 cup of the lettuce and about 2 tablespoons each of tomatoes and cheese.
6. Fold one end of the tortilla up about 1 inch over the filling.
7. Fold right and left sides over folded end, overlapping.
8. Fold down remaining end.
9. Serve. Garnish with shredded cheese if desired.
-----REFRIED BEANS-----
Heat lard in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until hot. Add pinto beans; cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Mash the beans and stir in the remaining ingredients. If necessary, add oil to the skillet. Cook and stir until a smooth paste forms, about 5 minutes.
